implementationNotes: Post type guard in both block component and sidebar panel (returns null if postType !== 'testimonial')
Auto-title sync: useEffect watches meta.name and calls editPost({ title: meta.name })
All 5 meta fields editable in both block body and sidebar panel (dual-location controls)
videoFile field uses MediaUpload with MediaUploadCheck — shows only when videoSource === 'file'
videoId field label dynamically changes to 'YouTube Video ID' or 'Vimeo Video ID' based on videoSource
videoSource uses ToggleGroupControl with three options: File, YouTube, Vimeo
Video section visually separated from text fields with border-t styling
Template lock 'all' added to testimonial post type — block is pre-inserted and cannot be added/removed/moved
